strengths: Proven engineering leadership with experience scaling teams and systems, including event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, re:cinq)
Hands-on expertise in agentic AI infrastructure, MCP frameworks, and real-time systems (e.g., work at re:cinq, Dunnhumby)
Strong backend/distributed systems skills with experience in regulated or high-stakes environments (e.g., fintech-adjacent pricing optimization at Optilyz)
concerns: Limited direct fintech experience (e.g., credit risk, working-capital management, or payment flows) as a primary focus
Short tenure at recent roles (e.g., 6 months at re:cinq) may raise questions about long-term stability or impact
No explicit mention of production-grade multi-agent AI systems beyond MCP frameworks or AI-agent tooling
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical leadership and hands-on experience with event-driven systems and AI-agent infrastructure, particularly in MCP frameworks and real-time data processing. However, his fintech-specific expertise is limited, and recent role durations are short, which may impact suitability for a high-stakes fintech leadership role. His background in scalable architectures and distributed systems partially offsets these gaps.
